programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Patties of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Justine's parents are coming for dinner, so the Simmons make a classic Caribbean meal inspired by Gramp's childhood in Trinidad.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: The High Tea Low Down
programme.desc: This week, Justine wants to recreate traditional English high tea, from flaky scones with strawberry jam to her favorite finger sandwiches - cucumber with herb butter, and smoked salmon with crFme fraiche.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Laidback Luau
programme.desc: Rev Run has been dreaming of feasting in a tropical paradise, but Justine wants to enjoy time at home with the family. To satisfy them both, she hatches a plan to create an at-home Hawaiian Luau.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Rev's Cook-Off Challenge
programme.desc: Rev Run's manager Michael Lehman claims to be the grill master and his right hand man Perry is the self-proclaimed fry king. Rev decides to put their skills to test by having them cook their signature dishes.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Diggy Does Dinner
programme.desc: Justine and Rev design a menu to satisfy Diggy's healthy lifestyle.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Eat Play Love
programme.desc: Rev Run and his family decide to make some Bowling Alley snacks with a healthy twist for this Sunday Supper.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Sizzling South Beach Brunch
programme.desc: A South Beach menu includes a Spanish tortilla with homemade chorizo.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tasty Trattoria Brunch
programme.desc: Decadent cinnamon mascarpone pancakes with warm morello cherries and hazelnut.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bay City Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's San Francisco-inspired brunch includes apricot-yogurt parfait.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Good Eats: Urban Preservation: The Jerky
programme.desc: Alton Brown explores the wonderful world of beef jerky.

programme.title: Good Eats: Deep Space Slime
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown makes spooky, gooey gelatine molds that kids will love.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.desc: While trying to dispose of Thanos' asteroid, the Guardians discover it has been taken to a secure facility that belongs to the Avengers.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Evolution Rock
programme.desc: The Guardians and the Avengers team-up to find out what powerful secrets lie inside Thanos' asteroid.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Lyin' Eyes
programme.desc: When Rocket and Drax wake up with absolutely no memory of the night before, it's up to the Guardians to piece together their adventures.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Free Bird
programme.desc: While the Guardians search for the missing sarcophagus, Groot finds a mysterious egg and does everything in his power to protect it.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When the Guardians are charged with escorting the young and rebellious Rigellian Princess Tana back home, Drax's hardened heart melts as he is reminded of his own daughter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast? / Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Fitness to Food

programme.title: Garth Brooks: The Road I'm On

programme.title: Garth Brooks: The Road I'm On
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the prolific career of Garth Brooks, the best-selling solo artist of all time. Follow him through his career from college bars to his record-breaking world tours, while balancing family life with global fame.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Just Wright
programme.desc: A physical therapist falls for the basketball player she is helping recover from an injury.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Frankensteined Ford
programme.desc: The guys put a '68 Ford F-100 truck together by combining parts from other cars that shouldn't go together. Rich relives his youth with a '77 Trans Am Firebird.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Blazer of Glory
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers complete their transformation on an old K5 Blazer and square body truck bed into the ultimate diesel-powered party on wheels. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave convinces Heavy D to give his El Camino what she needs to get back on the road.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Trucked Out: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Trucked Out with insider facts and extra scenes: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle all kinds of terrain. Diesel Dave puts the finishing touches on his El Camino.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Wrecked and Rolled
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers go on a top-secret, late-night mission to the spooky overflow lot, while the Dirty 7 are on the brink of watching their season crumble.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: They Call Me Bad Chad
programme.desc: Chad builds a one-of-a-kind coupe with square parts, recycled metal, and a 1939 Studebaker Commander.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got
programme.desc: Looking to expand his business, Chad takes on a commission to build a custom 1930s style delivery truck, starting from a discarded 1934 Desoto Airflow coupe.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fists Full of Snakes
programme.desc: Dusty and his team mount a critical hunt from a swamp buggy before racing south to the python-infested Ten Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Snakes in the Dark
programme.desc: Dusty leads the team to an abandoned missile factory near the epicenter of the snake epidemic that could hold the biggest concentration of pythons in the Everglades.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Enter the Super Snake
programme.desc: Dusty and team discover a frightening new hybrid Python species when they trek deep into the dense Python Pines to prevent the snakes from laying their eggs.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Dusty vs The Monster
programme.desc: When a potentially record-breaking python escapes Dusty's grasp, his obsession to catch it brings him face to face with the massive reptile in the most dangerous solo mission of his career.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle on the Brink
programme.desc: A year behind bars, Tickle transfers to Culpeper County, and Tim concocts a plan to get him out. Breaking the shiner code can come at a steep price for Mark Rogers. Mark & Digger's handmade vodka is on a hot streak until a cold snap put’s profits at risk.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Breaking the Code
programme.desc: A cold snap threatens Mark and Digger's handmade vodka. For Mark Rogers, breaking the moonshiner code can come at a steep price. And Tim Smith risks a big run of Tickle's double rye to put the woods back into his shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hillbilly Hack
programme.desc: Mark and Digger build a hillbilly hack to save their handmade vodka. Pam may know more than she thinks about Popcorn's lost shine. Nothing but trouble for Josh running a still outside of the woods. Patti and David risk a seaplane bootleg on the bayou.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle in a Pickle
programme.desc: With shine selling at $200 a gallon, Tickle returns to the woods with two notorious outlaw shiners. Mark and Digger rediscover Popcorn Sutton's mystery multi-grain shine, and Mike dumps his partner and hires a new hand to construct a hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to rediscover his roots on the outlaw side. Mike and Jerry devise a plan to access a perfectly hidden still site.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Drinks Gasoline/ Smelling Her Doll Head
programme.desc: Shannon is addicted to gasoline, drinking about 15 teaspoons everyday. Meanwhile, Lacey carries and smells her doll head 'Suzie Q' everywhere she goes.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Rampant Rats/ Extreme Fingernails
programme.desc: Theresa has more than 60 pet hairless rats that are taking over her tiny studio apartment. Meanwhile, 48-year old, Jazz has been growing her fingernails for 22 years. Her longest nail is two feet long, and she calls them her children.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Cat Food/ Smells Mothballs
programme.desc: Mary consumes over 900 cat treats and several cans of wet food every day. Alicia has been addicted to smelling mothballs for 15 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Cleanser/ Tanner
programme.desc: Crystal has been eating household cleanser every day since she was twelve. Samantha tans up to three times daily.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Extreme Hair/ Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her 10-pound locks. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/ Cat Lady
programme.desc: April is addicted to her puppets and can't leave without them; Debbie has over 20 cats.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Drywall/ Shower Drain Hair Collector
programme.desc: Evan has spent the last six years sneaking into bathrooms because he is addicted to collecting shower drain hair. And Nicole has spent the last seven years secretly breaking apart walls to feed her addiction: eating drywall.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Gas Sniffer/ Teddy Bear Obsession
programme.desc: For more than 30 years, Theresa has been addicted to smelling gasoline. Although she has battled cancer, anaemia and major stomach problems, she still cannot stop. Meanwhile, former drug-addict Krista has 12 'children,' all of which are teddy bears.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Watch Party: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Don't Have a Choice
programme.desc: Anna reveals big news to her family. Angela fights for Michael's visa. Syngin needs more from Tania. Mike has tough questions for Natalie. Betsy grills Sasha about his past. Anny cries shopping for a wedding dress. Blake's mom tries to bond with Jasmin.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Watch Party: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Don't Have a Choice
programme.desc: Anna reveals big news to her family. Angela fights for Michael's visa. Syngin needs more from Tania. Mike has tough questions for Natalie. Betsy grills Sasha about his past. Anny cries shopping for a wedding dress. Blake's mom tries to bond with Jasmin.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Day of Challenges
programme.desc: Stefania wants a simple, classic gown, but her family has grander ideas. Precious just had weight loss surgery and needs a gown to fit her shrinking frame. Cheryl’s wedding is in 72 days and she needs a dress to fit her thick frame and tall height.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding
programme.desc: Cheryl has recently beaten breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery a week ago. Jennifer is battling a rare kidney disease, and Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer. For these brides, their weddings are a celebration of love and life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: Dana is looking for her dream dress that her recently departed mother would approve of. Katy wants to add fabric from her late mother's gown to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a New Guy in Town
programme.desc: Randy discovers major changes at Kleinfeld, the biggest of which is that the bridal shop hired its first male consultant. Bride Tolu contends with her opinionated sister, and Amanda fears her gown won't be modest enough for her orthodox wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy, I Think I Got This
programme.desc: New consultant Shay is excited to help with a surprise marriage proposal, but trouble brews when he rejects Randy's offer to help. Former Miss USA Nia Sanchez has just one day to find her gown. Comedian Jamie learns dress shopping is no laughing matter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being Dadzilla
programme.desc: Alyssa calls her father 'Dadzilla,' and his opinions rule the day. Wedding planner Michelle feels extra pressure to find the perfect dress. When Emily's custom Pnina gown is all wrong, her dad 'Papazilla' demands a solution.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Male Perspective
programme.desc: Country music star Kristian Bush joins his friends to find bride Evyn's perfect dress for her Nashville wedding. Chelsea struggles with dress overload after trying on more than 70 gowns. Melanie is nervous her dress won't fit her plus size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends may not agree on her over-the-top sexy dress. Maria wants a pure white princess or mermaid gown, but shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice. Jaclyn faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sasha Dress
programme.desc: 'High School Musical' star Corbin Bleu joins his fiancée, Sasha, to find her dream dress. Bride Katie wants a classic ball gown, but her fiancé would like something sexier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We're Going to Say 'I Do' Underwater!
programme.desc: Omarosa of 'The Apprentice' is determined to find a colourful, dramatic gown for her big day. Jet-setting bride Valerie wants a dress fit for her lavish Ibiza wedding. Randy rescues bride Magaly who needs a dress for her underwater ceremony!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Empire State of Bride
programme.desc: The entire Kleinfeld team comes together as a family to help Emily, who needs a dress for her 10-year vow renewal atop the Empire State Building in just two days. Olympian Queen Harrison faces new hurdles while deciding on her dream wedding gown.

programme.title: Don't Look Away: The Dr. Is In
programme.desc: A sneak peek of all your favorite TLC doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyler and Taco
programme.desc: Tyler, the Creator and Loiter Squad co-star, Taco, visit the set of Ridiculousness and learn about Sloppy Finishes and Faceballs.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chris 'Drama' Pfaff I
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome Chris Pfaff to look on the bright side in Making Lemonade, get drizzled by some Butt Magic, and check out some unusual bucket lists with Die Happy.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Grant Gustin

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Who Are You Going to Telephone?

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Call Me When You Get There

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen who are breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a jet ski collision leads to arguments, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers
programme.desc: On the Gulf, oyster boats and fish retailers are inspected. Outside San Antonio, a poacher is caught after posting pictures. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps and help a pelican in distress.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles

programme.desc: Bart gets in trouble on Grandparents Day at school and is forced to hang out with Skinner's mother as punishment. After spending time with various grandmas in the neighbourhood, he learns the benefits of hanging out with the elderly.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moho House
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attempt to work on their marriage, not knowing that Mr. Burns and Nigel have a bet on whether Nigel can break them apart. With the successful, albeit unconventional, help of Moe, the couple gets back their mojo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dogtown
programme.desc: When Homer's court case determines that a dog's life is more valuable than a human's is, the status of man's best friend rises in Springfield. When the dogs recognize their new position of power, they assert their dominance over the humans.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Serfsons
programme.desc: In a magical medieval world, Marge's mother is turned into an Ice Walker and the only way for Homer to afford the cure is to force Lisa to use illegal magic. When the King discovers this, he kidnaps Lisa, and Homer must lead a feudal uprising to save her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Splendor
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa turn Lisa's sad experience into a successful graphic novel-turned-Broadway show, but they struggle with creative differences and ego.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whistler's Father
programme.desc: Homer discovers that Maggie is a whistling savant and launches her baby-celebrity career. Meanwhile, Marge impresses Fat Tony with her interior design taste, and he hires her to style his brothel.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII
programme.desc: Maggie becomes possessed by an ancient demon, Lisa discovers a creepy yet perfect version of her family in an alternate universe and Homer cannibalizes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grampy Can Ya Hear Me
programme.desc: Grampa gets a new hearing aid and finally hears what everyone has been saying about him. Meanwhile, Mr. Skinner discovers that his mother has kept the ultimate secret from him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Old Blue Mayor She Ain't What She Used to Be
programme.desc: Frustrated with the local government, Marge decides to run for Mayor. To win public support, she begins making Homer the butt of her jokes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Singin' in the Lane
programme.desc: Homer and the guys reunite their old bowling team to cheer up Moe, only to end up in fierce competition with a team of arrogant millionaires. Meanwhile, Lisa and Marge try to teach Bart that money isn't everything.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Lisa's Opus
programme.desc: As future Lisa writes her college application essay for Harvard, she recalls past disappointing birthdays that helped shape her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Boy
programme.desc: When Bart goes missing, the town puts together a search party to find him. After most give up hope, Sideshow Bob manipulates Millhouse into revealing where Bart is hiding.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Haw-Haw Land
programme.desc: When the Simpsons go to a STEM conference, Lisa falls for a crooning jazz pianist named Brendan. Meanwhile, Bart discovers that he has an affinity for chemistry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frink Gets Testy
programme.desc: Fearing that the end of the world is near, Mr. Burns tasks Dr. Frink with testing all of Springfield to determine who is worth saving. The results shake the Simpson family to their core.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Is Where the Art Isn't
programme.desc: When Homer is accused of stealing a million-dollar painting, only a detective from the 1970s can clear his name, or send him to jail.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 3 Scenes Plus a Tag From a Marriage
programme.desc: Homer and Marge recount the story of their transition from loving their life without kids to being miserable parents.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fears of a Clown
programme.desc: Bart goes to prankster rehab after a clown-mask prank terrifies the town and destroys Krusty's career. A tortured Krusty then tries his hand at serious drama with a regional theater company.

programme.title: The Simpsons: No Good Read Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the family together, Marge forces everyone to hand in their electronics and take a trip to a book store.

programme.title: The Simpsons: King Leer
programme.desc: Homer and Marge follow Moe after the bar closes early and discover him and his father fighting. The Simpsons, after finding out that Moe has been excommunicated from his family for years, attempt to bring them back together.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Gets the Blues
programme.desc: When the Simpsons' flight to Gainesville gets re-routed to New Orleans, Lisa is forced to face her failures, and regain her confidence as a jazz musician. Meanwhile, Bart is intrigued by the voodoo in Louisiana.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Forgive and Regret
programme.desc: Grampa makes a confession to Homer while on his deathbed. After his recovery, he comes to realize that this issue will not be easy to reconcile.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Left Behind
programme.desc: Homer gets Flanders a job at the plant, and he soon learns that no good deed goes unpunished when Flanders starts to insist on carpools and demands more from Homer's work performance. Meanwhile, Marge feels as though their marriage has lost its spark.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Throw Grampa From the Dane
programme.desc: After receiving an insurance payout, the Simpsons go to Denmark, so Grampa can benefit from the country's free healthcare.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flanders' Ladder
programme.desc: After getting struck by lightning, Bart receives visits from ghosts, who want closure only he can provide in.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Not Dead
programme.desc: Bart takes a dare, and ends up in the hospital. To cover for himself and Homer, he says he went to Heaven and met Jesus. Christian producers offer the Simpsons a movie deal, which Homer takes. But Bart can’t deal with the guilt and comes clean to Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Marge and Homer's marriage is tested when they travel to a tropical island to compete for a million dollars on Marge's favourite reality competition show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Way or the Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: God and St. Peter contemplate what merits a soul getting into heaven, while citizens of Springfield remember their divine encounters.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIX
programme.desc: Homer wins an oyster-eating contest against the mythical Cthulhu, Springfield is overrun by plant body-snatchers, Lisa finally snaps and Mr. Burns opens a retirement home with some Jurassic upgrades.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Baby You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: A self-driving car company comes to Springfield, poaching all of the power plant employees with their fun work environment.

programme.title: The Simpsons: From Russia Without Love
programme.desc: On a mission to play hardcore pranks, Bart, Nelson and Milhouse get Moe a mail-order bride on the Dark Web.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Werking Mom
programme.desc: Marge wants a job, and stumbles into becoming a plastic food storage container-selling drag queen. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make the world better in the style of 'Amelie.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty the Clown
programme.desc: Homer finds his calling as a TV recapper, but his harsh grading causes a brawl with Krusty. After almost killing Homer, Krusty hides out at a real circus, and finds happiness there.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Daddicus Finch
programme.desc: Lisa and Homer's bond gets stronger when they start spending real quality time together, and Bart feels neglected. So Marge tries to help Homer balance his attention between the kids.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 'Tis the 30th Season
programme.desc: After failed Black Friday shopping, Marge is determined to fix Christmas but Homer and the kids decide to surprise her by going on vacation to a Floridian resort that turns out to be a knock-off Disney World.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mad About the Toy
programme.desc: When Marge and Homer leave Grampa to babysit the kids, some little green army men trigger a PTSD episode, sending the family on a journey to Grampa’s past to when he was a post-war toy model.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: When Lisa spots a new best friend from the window of the bus, she gets a taste of what life could be like with a different, more cultured family, and proceeds to try and live a double life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Dancing as Fat as I Can
programme.desc: Homer angers Marge by binging their favourite show without her, and has to pick up a new skill in order to make amends. Meanwhile, Bart prepares to compete in 'Krusty's Holiday Trample.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Clown Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Krusty reveals the untold story of his past in his movie 'The Sands of Space.' While working as personal assistants on the movie, Bart and Lisa learn about the early years of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations
programme.desc: After Homer steals Comic Book Guy's car, he must either prove his innocence in court or reconcile with the jilted nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Want You (She's So Heavy)
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa attempts to fix her parents' strained relationship by seeking advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E My Sports
programme.desc: As Bart begins to excel in video game competitions, Homer discovers a passion for coaching him. Lisa attempts to bring Homer back to reality, but the plan causes chaos.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart vs. Itchy & Scratchy
programme.desc: Krusty releases an all-female reboot of 'Itchy and Scratchy,' so Bart and his male friends decide to boycott the show. After Bart's friends turn on him for laughing at the reboot, Bart joins a group of girls who commit crimes against patriarchy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band
programme.desc: Lisa is scouted by the director of the Capitol City Philharmonic, to her band teacher's dismay. Homer works extra shifts at the plant so Lisa can play, putting strain on the family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh
programme.desc: Marge becomes Director of Springfield's local theater, armed with Lisa's script resembling 'Hamilton.' Meanwhile, Homer joins a baby class with Maggie, where he takes a liking to supervisor Chloe.

programme.title: The Simpsons: D'oh Canada
programme.desc: On a family vacation to Niagara Falls, Lisa is mistakenly granted political asylum in Canada. When Marge goes to rescue Lisa, they are forced to re-evaluate their love for America as they navigate the polite Canadian landscape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Woo-Hoo Dunnit
programme.desc: When the secret stack of cash aka Lisa's college fund Marge keeps under the sink goes missing, the documentary crime series 'Deadline Springfield' goes in-depth to solve the case, leaving no stone unturned.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Knock Knock
programme.desc: When a sinister landlord shows Bill and her friends the perfect house-share, they have no idea what lies ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Oxygen
programme.desc: Trapped on a space station with no oxygen, the Doctor, Bill, and Nardole are horrified to discover the automated spacesuits keeping them alive are also trying to kill them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Extremis
programme.desc: In the Vatican's secret library lies a book that causes the reader to immediately take their own life. When a translation makes its way online, the Vatican appeals to the Doctor for help.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Pyramid at the End of the World
programme.desc: The Doctor is offered a deal by an alien race that would save humanity.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Bill and Nardole set out on a deadly mission to rescue the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Empress of Mars
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives on Mars to discover that the Victorians have left their mark on the planet, causing a rift with the Ice Warriors.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Eaters of the Light
programme.desc: A hunt for the lost Ninth Roman Legion leads the Doctor, Bill, and Nardole into the middle of an ancient battle that could cast humanity into the dark forever.

programme.title: Doctor Who: World Enough and Time
programme.desc: The Doctor makes a rash decision when he witnesses the death of somebody during the event horizon of a black hole.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor Falls
programme.desc: The Doctor makes a final stand against an army of Cybermen, to protect a tiny band of humans from destruction.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Twice Upon a Time
programme.desc: The magical final chapter of the twelfth Doctor's journey sees the Time Lord team up with his former self, the first ever Doctor, and a returning Bill Potts, for one last adventure.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Smile
programme.desc: The Doctor and Bill find the colonists missing when they visit a spectacular city on a distant planet. The mystery may be connected to a band of 'cute' droids.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Thin Ice
programme.desc: London, 1814. The entire city has turned out for the biggest Frost Fair in decades! But beneath the Thames, revelers are disappearing, snatched through the ice. Will the Doctor and Bill stop the slaughter before they too are dragged into the icy waters?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Knock Knock
programme.desc: When a sinister landlord shows Bill and her friends the perfect house-share, they have no idea what lies ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor's Wife
programme.desc: By following a Time Lord distress signal, the Doctor puts Amy, Rory and his beloved TARDIS in grave danger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Rebel Flesh
programme.desc: A solar tsunami liberates doppelgangers from their human 'originals' in a futuristic factory.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Almost People
programme.desc: The Doctor must convince terrified factory-workers to work with their doppelgangers to overcome a monster of their own making.

programme.title: Doctor Who: A Good Man Goes to War
programme.desc: The Doctor assembles an army to face the Battle of Demons Run. River Song has something to tell him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Empty Child
programme.desc: At the height of the Blitz, the bombsites of London are haunted by an unearthly child.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor Dances
programme.desc: The Child's plague is spreading throughout wartime London, and its zombie army is on the march.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Listen
programme.desc: Ghosts of the past and future crowd into the lives of the Doctor and Clara and send them on an adventure that takes them to the end of the universe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Trapped in a world unlike any other he has seen, the Doctor faces the greatest challenge of his many lives. Pursued by the fearsome creature known only as the Veil, he must attempt the impossible.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl in the Fireplace
programme.desc: Madame de Pompadour's dreams are being haunted by a stranger called the Doctor. When she finds the court of Versailles under attack from clockwork droids she tries to summon her mysterious Doctor to save the day.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Blink
programme.desc: A young woman finds cryptic messages from 1969 coming from a stranger called the Doctor when people start disappearing.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Australia's Deadliest Coast
programme.desc: In Western Australia, shark attacks are on the rise… and investigators are racing to find out why.

programme.desc: Sharks are rulers of the aquatic world, molded by evolution into a fierce predator. Few dare to challenge the king of the ocean, but we investigate what kinds of animals would be daring enough to take on these killing machines.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Gallop Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team visit a local breeder to check on her limping horse, DooBee.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: LLama Rama Ding Dong
programme.desc: Temperatures are blazing in Michigan and there are more farm calls than ever for Dr. Pol.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Flu the Coop
programme.desc: The clinic faces the wrath of the flu.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ready, Vet, Go!
programme.desc: The Dr. Pol Veterinary team is finally getting some relief from their busy schedules in the form of a recent vet school graduate named Dr. Sandra.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Rock N' Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is visited by his Dutch family and Charles L.A. lady.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: 5 Oinking Pigs
programme.desc: From a potbelly pig to hurt horses and injured cats, it’s as busy a week as ever for the staff at Pol Veterinary Services. There’s a birthday to celebrate too!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.desc: Working through tough cases and intense conditions is all in a day's work at PVS.

programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, it’s a rodeo of a week at Pol vet.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Three Vets and a Baby
programme.desc: Spring is in full swing in central Michigan, leaving the vets of PVS with hands full of babies.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Don't Turkey, Be Happy!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: What's Up, Doc?

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Charles in Charge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his wife go away on vacation leaving the staff the man the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Baby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: A Great Dane is adopted.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pigs in a Blanket
programme.desc: Cold temperatures present the staff with challenges keeping the animals warm.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: New Dog, Pol Tricks
programme.desc: Birthing season has arrived and the chaos only begins.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cat in the H.A.T.S
programme.desc: Dr. Pol volunteers at a Humane Animal Treatment Society while life hangs in the balance at the clinic.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: American UFO Coverups
programme.desc: Recent news of the Pentagon’s secret UFO program may lead to shocking evidence of what the military has hidden for decades.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mysteries of the Big Bang
programme.desc: New discoveries are giving astronomers critical evidence about what happened when our universe was born, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest science, they might be able to finally prove if the Big Bang is responsible for our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang
programme.desc: As experiments go, the Large Hadron Collider at Cern is one of the biggest. Its circular tunnel is 17 miles long, and the most expensive at a cost of six billion dollars. Presenter Brian Cox tackles the question: what exactly is it going to tell us?

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mayan City of Blood
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, the lost city of Chichen Itza contains ancient secrets of a mysterious civilization. Follow the scientists working to find how the city of Chichen Itza was built, and how the bloody rite of human sacrifice shaped the city.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets behind the fall of the Inca capital of Cusco.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Real Atlantis
programme.desc: A mysterious ruined city in Greece is the home of the mythical Labyrinth and the Minotaur, and its catastrophic downfall might have inspired the legend of Atlantis. New discoveries at this site reveal a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Jungle Treasure
programme.desc: The discovery of strange giant stone heads in the Mexican jungle leads archaeologists to the lost capital city of the Olmec, and new investigations reveal evidence that the secret knowledge of these mysterious people changed life in the Americas forever.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: The Big House: Auburn
programme.desc: The State Penitentiary in Auburn, New York is a monument to criminal rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: American Justice: A Warrant to Kill
programme.desc: A look at the dispute between Deputy Sheriff Joseph Kent McGowan and Susan White.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 100%, Every Time
programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City
programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Always Remain Calm
programme.desc: Tampa first responders have a chaotic night treating seizure and overdose patients; the ROC Squad Task Force tracks down suspected armed robbers in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I Did It
programme.desc: Michelle Kinney is found murdered in her apartment in Dubuque, Iowa. Her neighbours are puzzled as she had no enemies. Local detectives unveil a haunting truth, leading to a shocking confession from an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: When Cody MacPherson moves to New Jersey to look for work, he falls in with a new group of friends. After a late night of partying, he disappears without a trace. Six months later, this missing persons investigation soon turns into a homicide.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: When Cody MacPherson moves to New Jersey to look for work, he falls in with a new group of friends. After a late night of partying, he disappears without a trace. Six months later, this missing persons investigation soon turns into a homicide.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watching Dru
programme.desc: Young student Dru Sjodin suddenly vanishes after her shift at Victoria's Secret. Investigators turn to the best eyewitness they have: surveillance camera footage. Dru's last movements are traced and reveal the chilling reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: See No Evil: We See You, Kelsey
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears from a Kansas Mall. The only clue for detectives are the haunting final images of her on surveillance video. Somewhere in these frames hides the answer and a killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Michigan City Murder
programme.desc: On April 23, 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga is found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office. Surveillance cameras in the area may have filmed the fatal encounter.

programme.title: See No Evil: Mr. Reed Will See You
programme.desc: Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. What seems like a possible crime of passion is turned on its head after a surprise discovery. Surveillance footage helps police unravel the mystery behind Keith's death and just who killed him.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Nurse
programme.desc: Bright young nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. An old friend of hers points a finger at Michelle's ex-boyfriend. Cops discover footage that shows Michelle's car driving around the parking lot where she vanished, but who is the driver?

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Captain Freddy
programme.desc: On August 15th 2015, police are alerted to the body of Fernando Silva on a boat. With the crime scene revealing little about what caused his death, police turn to surveillance footage for clues.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Her husband is devastated and detectives have few clues to work with... until chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run From the Scene
programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.
