programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys sit down to talk about a few of their favourite things: cabins and barns. With special guests, never-before-seen footage and hilarious outtakes, the builders are having fun. Mark also talks about his new house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Go behind the build to see how the HGTV Dream Home 2020 comes together from the ground up. This spectacular home is designed with outdoor living in mind on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, in one of the island's most sought after communities.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Miami Flip: Front Yard Fix
programme.desc: Carolina turns her attention to the front of the house where she's kicking up the curb appeal. Her tight budget takes a hit when a quick roof repair becomes a larger job, and city codes require extra work for the new driveway build.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Black and White Beauty
programme.desc: Paige talks Melinda into bidding on a three-bedroom, one-bathroom home at auction. The ladies improve the small, unimpressive space with an addition and some smart decorating ideas.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Wraparound Ranch Home
programme.desc: The Hayhurst Brothers score a problematic three-bedroom, two-bathroom home at auction. The house lacks a master suite and the chimney must be demolished before the structure can be relocated.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Storage Friendly Family Home
programme.desc: Paige and Raf revamp a small two-bedroom cottage they won at auction. They increase the home's size and alter the floor plan to make family-friendly living spaces.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Cozy Cottage vs. Gary's Girls' Architectural Abode
programme.desc: HD Snow calls on his family to renovate a couple of storage houses he has on his moving yard. Donna and Toni take one house while Gary's girls take the other as the friendly family competition begins. Both teams plan to reuse some of the homes' contents.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet Cinnamon Roll Waffle to the hearty and delicious Breakfast Poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Since Sliced Bread
programme.desc: Get ready for some seriously spectacular sandwiches! Alton Brown relives his childhood with a slaw dog in South Carolina, while Alex Guarnaschelli treks to Nantucket for a terrific turkey sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.desc: America's cheesiest dishes just got even cheesier and Food Obsessed is here to find them! We're piling our plates high with mounds of ooey-gooey goodness from all around the country.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Oodles of Noodles
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is exploring the endless options for noodles! We've prepared our appetites for everything from noodles swimming in marinara sauce to noodles fried to perfection.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Franks For The Memories
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is searching high and low for hot dogs, frankfurters and sausages that will blow your mind!

programme.title: Food Obsessed: How We Roll
programme.desc: From spring rolls and dinner rolls to rolling dough and rolling out the barrel, you won't believe what mouthwatering food is coming next.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Homerun Barbecue
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in St. Louis looking for the best deals for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. First up to bat is a slider piled high with pulled pork and chorizo chili. For lunch under the arch, it's a jail cell pork belly BLT.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pluto and the Pup / Trouble at Floochi's!
programme.desc: Pluto becomes upset with a stowaway pup Mickey unknowingly brings to the garage. The Happy Helpers help when a pair of diamond shoes are swapped at the shoe store for another pair!

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Hypnotic Hughesville/The Piggy Bank Caper
programme.desc: When the Great Orsino hypnotizes everyone in Hughesville, the Rocketeer must find a way to wake them! Sylvester Slapdash steals Kit's piggy bank in search of a special coin!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Armadylan Action Hero/Super Muscles Show Off
programme.desc: Ninja uses Armadylan's dream of becoming a kung fu movie star to break into a museum. While Gekko and Armadylan guard the city, their watch turns into a contest of who's strongest!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: Live From Lincoln Center: New York Philharmonic New Year's Eve 2019: Sondheim Celebration
programme.desc: The New York Philharmonic and guest vocalist Katrina Lenk ('The Band’s Visit') celebrate the orchestral music of Stephen Sondheim, performing suites from 'Sunday in the Park,' 'Into the Woods,' 'Sweeney Todd,' and more.

programme.title: Ribbon of Sand
programme.desc: The beautiful view of North Carolina's Cape Lookout contains a set of natural barrier islands, which are in danger of disappearing.

programme.title: POV: Midnight Traveler
programme.desc: When the Taliban puts a bounty on Afghan director Hassan Fazili's head, he is forced to flee with his wife and two young daughters. Fazili shows firsthand the dangers facing refugees seeking asylum and the love shared between a family on the run.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: St. Louis (Hour Two)
programme.desc: Discover spectacular St. Louis treasures, including 1927 Rookwood Shirayamadani black opal vase, an Elijah Pierce preaching stick from around 1950 and an Ozark Airlines poster dating to around 1960.

programme.title: Live From Lincoln Center: New York Philharmonic New Year's Eve 2019: Sondheim Celebration
programme.desc: The New York Philharmonic and guest vocalist Katrina Lenk ('The Band’s Visit') celebrate the orchestral music of Stephen Sondheim, performing suites from 'Sunday in the Park,' 'Into the Woods,' 'Sweeney Todd,' and more.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Mobility and Balance
programme.desc: Highlighting a variety of exercises to improve balance and concludes with stroking.

programme.title: Arthur: Fern's Flights of Fancy/ Cereal
programme.desc: Fern might give up her dreams of being a writer just because of one silly rejection. Then, Buster tells the story of a missing cereal box on his all-new podcast.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Not a Sound/ Mindy in Space
programme.desc: The kids get information from Dr. Rafferty and then travel to outer space to confirm the amazing fact that there is no sound in outer space, even though Jet is convinced he's heard sounds all over the solar system.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Flamingo-a-Go-Go/ What a Tangled Web
programme.desc: While playing a game of nature I-spy, Squeeks spies something pink. Then, Nature Cat is really sad today. It seems that someone has been taking all his cat toys, most recently Mr. Silly Sock.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: The House Hunt/ Dolphin Games
programme.desc: Splash, Bubbles and their best friends Dunk and Ripple go on epic adventures.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Sap Season/ Book of Mammoths
programme.desc: It’s been a long winter in Qyah, and everyone is out of birch syrup. Molly and her Dad are shocked when Travis, a tourist, announces that the goal of his expedition is to find a living woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mary Shelley/ I Am Harry Houdini
programme.desc: Xavier goes back in time to meet spooky storyteller Mary Shelley before a Nature Troop campout.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Guitar to Sitar/ Spring Has Not Sprung
programme.desc: In Delhi, Carmen goes looking for guitar strings so she can write her mother a birthday song, but in the process, she and the kids learn about a different stringed instrument called a sitar.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: Peg + Cat: Save the World
programme.desc: Peg and Cat use top-secret devices to solve the mystery of the gigantic blob soaring towards Earth.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Plays Ball/ O Builds a Tower
programme.desc: Daniel gets frustrated when he can't catch the ball; O the Owl builds a tower.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Mechanics in Space
programme.desc: Rudy is pretending to be a space alien from another planet. When his space ship won't start, Abby and Elmo play mechanics.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Pink Lemonade/ Pink Shoes
programme.desc: Pinkalicious and Peter start a lemonade stand to save up money, but they have no customers.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Bread
programme.desc: See how the bakers tackle three of Paul’s toughest challenges ever: preparing a sweet dough with a twist; avoiding a burnt bottom and a soggy top; and using three different flours to create a huge showstopper centrepiece.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Victoria: A Show of Unity
programme.desc: After an assassination attempt, the Royal household visit Ireland. Intrigue, conflict, and romance all blossom during a stay at the Palmerston estate.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Victoria: A Coburg Quartet
programme.desc: A Georgian ball at the Palace could not come at a worse time as private pictures of the Royal family are made public.

programme.title: Victoria and Albert: The Wedding
programme.desc: Witness the most accurate reconstruction of Victoria and Albert's wedding ever staged, followed by a sumptuous wedding breakfast, a prelude to the first night that began a marriage so iconic, it heralded constitutional monarchy as we know it today.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Remember Me Too
programme.desc: Benson's suspicions about a kidnapping victim uncover a dangerous criminal network prepared to silence anyone who gets in their way.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Zero Tolerance
programme.desc: Benson and Stone take drastic measures to reunite a young girl rescued from a sex trafficker with her mother. Rollins gives her rocky relationship another chance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Revenge
programme.desc: A string of break-in assaults grows more violent as the cops investigate an online incel group to identify a suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Accredo
programme.desc: A member of a women's empowerment group is found murdered, leading the cops to the group's charismatic male leader. Rollins keeps her pregnancy under wraps to avoid going on desk duty.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Exile
programme.desc: A young woman wakes up in the hospital with no memory of her assault and Carisi's investigation dissolves when she disappears.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Caretaker
programme.desc: The cops wrestle with an unthinkable crime when a family is murdered in their sleep.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: A waitress from a trendy New York restaurant is sexually assaulted at an after-hours VIP party.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mea Culpa
programme.desc: Stone takes his own case to trial when a woman from his past accuses him of sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Alta Kockers
programme.desc: The investigation into a promising new author's death leads to a decades-old secret kept between two reclusive brothers.

programme.title: Dare Me: Coup D'État
programme.desc: The arrival of the starry new cheer coach Colette French threatens Addy and Beth's tight bond.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead leading Rollins to go undercover at the last place she was seen alive, a high-end rehab center. Meanwhile, Benson tries to overcome her doubts about Sheila.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Something Happened
programme.desc: Benson must disclose secrets of her past to help an assault victim recall details of a traumatic night.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intent
programme.desc: The officers become entangled in an elaborate online hoax that ends with the sexual assault of a popular social media star. Det. Benson sets firm ground rules with Sheila.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gone Baby Gone
programme.desc: Emotions run high as the SVU squad searches for Benson's missing son.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assaulting Reality
programme.desc: The producers of a reality dating series make Benson and the SVU part of the show when they investigate contestant’s claims that she was raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Motherly Love
programme.desc: A teenage boy uses a rifle to stop an assault on his mother, but soon learns the target was someone he knows.

programme.title: The Biggest Loser: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at USA's 'The Biggest Loser.'

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: No Surrender
programme.desc: Fin revisits his military roots when a fellow Army Ranger struggles to recover from a sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Genes
programme.desc: An investigation hits a nerve with Benson when a suspect claims his genetics caused him to commit rape.

programme.title: The Sinner: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at USA's 'The Sinner.'

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Conversion
programme.desc: A young woman is raped by her church group leading Barba to argue the First Amendment doesn't entitle a person to break the law.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mood
programme.desc: The bizarre details of a woman's rape put the SVU at odds when Rollins and Carisi think her story is fabricated. Meanwhile, Benson goes on the offensive when her personal life is scrutinized.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chasing Demons
programme.desc: A doctor arrested for sexually abusing his patients is set free after Cassidy's testimony causes a mistrial.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dear Ben

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Part 33
programme.desc: As Stone prosecutes the case of a woman who killed her abusive husband, Benson and her squad wrestle with the duty of testifying against her.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Brothel
programme.desc: Fin teams up with an old colleague to track down the proprietor of a pop-up brothel.

programme.title: Movie: The BFG

programme.desc: When Jack Reacher returns to his old headquarters, he discovers he is being charged with a crime committed nearly 20 years ago. He travels across the country to make things right. His mission is to clear his name and that of his unit's new leader.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: More Now

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A world-travelling photographer takes some time off at Christmas to care for her grandmother. While there, she meets her neighbour, who needs help caring for his young nephew, and love develops.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: A free-spirited former Graceland tour guide, awaiting news of her dream museum job, meets a busy single father on a Graceland tour and agrees to be his temporary nanny for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Around the Clock
programme.desc: A woman plans a Christmas to remember with her college friends, only to be thwarted by an opportunity she can't pass up. Much to her surprise, she is forced to team up with a man who has a completely different view of what Christmas really means.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: While planning a final Christmas gala at the exquisite Ashford Estate, a house manager falls for the handsome executor of the estate.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen
programme.desc: A wish upon a snow globe for a romantic Christmas comes true, but the romance is with someone unexpected.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa grants a wish for a woman and she gets a chance to prove herself to her boss. Santa's wish only gives her 48 hours and as the clock ticks down, she channels the Christmas magic and speaks her mind all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman loses her job and beau on the same day and reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska. When she gets the position she originally hoped for, she must choose between a life she's always wanted and her new life in Alaska.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: After being shunned by the others kids, Damien, the Son of Satan, calls upon his father to fight Jesus in the ultimate Pay-Per-View Boxing Match between good and evil. Cartman gets upset when the match is held on his birthday.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Are You There God? It's Me Jesus
programme.desc: On the eve of the Millennium, people from all over the world gather outside Jesus' house waiting for a miracle. Meanwhile, Kenny and Cartman plan a 'mature' New Year's Eve celebration.

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Hindsight
programme.desc: 'Coon and Friends' set out to help the victims of BP's latest catastrophic drilling accident in the Gulf. Much to the Coon's dismay, another Super Hero gets there first.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion Rises
programme.desc: Mysterion's true identity is revealed. Meanwhile, the Coon, scorned by his fellow Super Heroes, turns to the demon god Cthulhu to help him get his revenge on friends and the rest of mankind.

programme.title: South Park: Coon vs. Coon and Friends
programme.desc: Coon and Friends find themselves at the mercy of Cartman who now has the dark lord, Cthulhu, doing his bidding. Kenny wrestles with the curse of his super power through his alter ego, Mysterion.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: The House Bunny
programme.desc: A Playboy Bunny is expelled from the mansion on her 27th birthday and takes a job as housemother for a sorority in desperation.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act
programme.desc: Experts empower women to seek personal and professional growth while managing a career, family and home.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Most Unforgettable Moments
programme.desc: Host, Jamie Otis, takes us on a journey back through 8 seasons of Married at First Sight by counting down the Top 8 most unforgettable moments in 8 different categories.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: The House Bunny
programme.desc: A Playboy Bunny is expelled from the mansion on her 27th birthday and takes a job as housemother for a sorority in desperation.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Holiday Spirits: That Outlaw Life
programme.desc: The moonshiners share their thoughts on the outlaw moonshining life, double distilling for double money and unique stills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Holiday Spirits: Once an Outlaw, Always an Outlaw
programme.desc: Tickle taps into his outlaw experience while mashing in his first batch of illegal shine after returning to the backwoods. Mark and Digger save a Popcorn legacy mash and Mike takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Holiday Spirits: Tickle Brings it Back
programme.desc: Tickle depends on his previous experience as an outlaw moonshiner while taking on his first big run in years. Mark and Huck look for a big-money buyer while Daniel learns he's been replaced during his time off.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Holiday Spirits: In the Name of Shine
programme.desc: The moonshiners share their unique thoughts and experience while teaming up with a former competitor to sell shine in another county. Mike and Jerry find out about a competitor while Mark tracks an intruder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Mark and Digger attempt to turn wedding cake into moonshine, Tickle runs for cover as aerial surveillance hovers overhead and Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back in action.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: Josh breaks into his secret stash to build a new still site, and breaks out his shotgun when a drone invades his airspace. Daniel hits the jackpot selling for Mark and Digger, while Mike finds his steady customers mysteriously less thirsty than usual.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Rules of the Hunt
programme.desc: Dusty and his team of expert snake hunters expose the five unwritten rules of python hunting and look ahead to the bigger stakes and bolder snakes in their future.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Snake Bitten
programme.desc: Tim Smith has a visitor from his outlaw past, Mark and Digger get a sign from above in Tennessee and Josh's favorite still hand has a brush with death.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: Josh breaks into his secret stash to build a new still site, and breaks out his shotgun when a drone invades his airspace. Daniel hits the jackpot selling for Mark and Digger, while Mike finds his steady customers mysteriously less thirsty than usual.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Rules of the Hunt
programme.desc: Dusty and his team of expert snake hunters expose the five unwritten rules of python hunting and look ahead to the bigger stakes and bolder snakes in their future.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiner vs. Hogzilla
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff c all in legendary moonshiner Jim Tom to help fix their busted still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Storm's a-Brewing
programme.desc: A monster storm hits the Carolinas and Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom risk their lives to run a batch of shine. Nearby, Josh and Bill fall prey to the same storm when a flood threatens their underground still site.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Small Tire Mountaineers
programme.desc: The entire Memphis family heads up to an air strip in West Virginia for the small tire event of JJ's Arm Drop, with several of the MSO racers switching to small tire to battle it out to see who can take home the $15,000 prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Arm Drop In Appalachia
programme.desc: JJ and the Memphis family are gearing up for the big tire event of JJ's Arm Drop in West Virginia. Everyone learned from the small tire event that the asphalt on this former airstrip is sketchy, especially in the right lane.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Appalachian Accidents
programme.desc: The big tire event of JJ's Arm Drop in West Virginia continues into round two with 13 MSO racers working to take out the remaining non-MSO racers. If somebody from the Memphis family can make it to the end and take home the $25,000, the whole family wins.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle, and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Damned in Africa
programme.desc: It's kill or be killed as survivalists Jeff and Eva journey to Madagascar and take on the unforgiving Massif D'Isalo, a nasty boa constrictor, abundant black widows and harsh desert landscape.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A Navy vet and a military mom tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's uninhabitable Cayo Venado. A prowling black panther, tree sap poisonous to the touch, and a week of freezing rain lead this pair of survivalists right up to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: King of the Forest
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed 'King of the forest' and a skilled endurance athlete take on the Alabama backwoods. They secure shelter and fire on Day 1, but once hunger kicks in it pushes one of them to do something we've never seen on Naked and Afraid before.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: A survival instructor and retiree of the armed forces are inserted into the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat. With completely different survival styles, they find a way to work together, but one accident single-handedly has an eruptive effect on both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blindsided
programme.desc: A dangerous burn and clashing survival strategies plague survivalists Angela and Steven in the jungles of Panama.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Popping Popeye
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18, while the other half is a size 8. Anthony's cyst is in the area called the Triangle of Death. Shane wants to get a lump off his back. Brandi's anxiety could prevent her from getting a lump removed from her chest.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.desc: A trailer business in Tampa, FL specializing in food concessions is being driven into the ground by two owners in a toxic partnership who compete for control. Marcus tries to bring these owners and the two sides of the business together.

programme.title: The Profit: The Soup Market
programme.desc: A Milwaukee-based chain of soup restaurants has been struggling since its co-owner’s sudden passing. The remaining owner’s stubbornness and lack of business know-how are putting a strain on the company and its employees.

programme.title: Dateline: Troubled Waters

programme.title: The Profit: My Roots
programme.desc: Marcus Lemonis travels to the land of his birth: Lebanon. He was adopted by an American couple when he was nine months old after being put in an orphanage during the Civil War. He makes emotional discoveries about himself and learns about Lebanon.

programme.title: The Profit: Dante's

programme.title: The Profit: Skinny Latina
programme.desc: Local Miami celebrity Ana Quinoces' sauce and marinade business has failed to take off. While Ana's poor branding and overly defensive attitude prove to be a handful for Marcus, she must prove her mettle before The Profit invests.

programme.title: The Profit: Polar Bear Coolers
programme.desc: At Polar Bear Coolers sales have been plummeting the last few years due to a broken inventory process and an owner more concerned with 'rocking out' than appreciating his employees. Marcus tries to help improve communication and streamline the process.

programme.title: The Profit: Macaron Queen
programme.desc: A mother and daughter team dealing with health problems and family resentments, needs Marcus to help them face their issues and raise their Macaron business to the next level.

programme.title: The First 48: Spree Killer

programme.title: The First 48: A Fighting Chance
programme.desc: When an argument at a local bar ends with a young social activist shot sixteen times, detectives search for answers in a divided community.

programme.title: The First 48: Young Guns
programme.desc: When an innocent bystander protecting a young woman is gunned down, Tulsa detectives scramble to learn who fired the fatal shots before anyone else gets hurt.

programme.title: The First 48: After Hours and the Cutting Edge
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a stranger guns down a new father in a parking lot. In Gwinnett County, a man is stabbed more than 20 times when someone he trusts turns against him.

programme.title: The First 48: A Man's Game
programme.desc: A young man is shot and left to die in the bushes; a mysterious car is the key.

programme.title: The First 48: Score to Settle/ In Her Arms
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a father is killed when a man opens fire in a crowded convenience store. In Tulsa, a young man about to be married is gunned down before he can turn his life around.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Footloose
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 20
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the dumbest partiers from a streaker to a wedding dance.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Partiers 22
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Warthogs, WogHearts, and Hogwarts
programme.desc: Find out what happens when Michael tricks an off-duty cop with a fake bill, which prop kept malfunctioning and which one was used in an unaired sitcom pilot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Drone Care
programme.desc: Find out what trick was almost cancelled due to rain; which insect attacked the magic team during rehearsal; and what is Michael's shirt size.

programme.desc: When Big invites Carrie to lunch, she ignores Miranda's advice and accepts his invitation.

programme.desc: Carrie meets a jazzman to help her get over Big; Samantha crosses some boundaries.

programme.desc: Charlotte's battle with her mother-in-law explodes; Samantha's relationship gets a boost.

programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself

programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Oyster Heist

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware

programme.desc: When a sinkhole threatens to swallow a nearby neighborhood, Tia teams up with cat expert Jackson Galaxy to rescue dozens of cats. And, after finding a neglected mama dog near the warehouse, Tia and her team span out to try and find her puppies.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Tip of the Iceberg
programme.desc: After Tia and Sugar rescue a stray, they are shocked by what they find and race him to the vet. New worker Darius pursues his dream of working in the veterinary field. And an empty nester heads to Villalobos looking for a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Our Growing Pack

programme.desc: Meet the Irish wolfhound, American pit bull terrier, Gordon setter, silky terrier, wonder dogs, cocker spaniel and papillion.

programme.desc: Barry Williams joins Lara Spencer and Jasmine Roth to recreate his attic bedroom, but in a very unexpected part of the house. Also, Jasmine pulls double duty working on Mike and Carol Brady's master bedroom with Mike Lookinland.

programme.desc: A couple's big win was the break they desperately needed to move out of their cramped basement rental and give their two children a better life. David Bromstad helps them search the suburbs outside Boston for the perfect family dream home.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy: Cameron McCormick at Keeton Park Golf Course
programme.desc: An instructional program featuring special guests.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy: Larry Mize: Full Swing
programme.desc: Larry Mize discusses how amateurs and professionals can effectively use irons and drivers to improve their game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy: Gary Player: Full Swing
programme.desc: 9-Time Major Champion Gary Player covers the fundamentals for a successful golf swing. From grip to swing plane, Player reveals the secrets that helped him become one of the greatest international players of all time. Hosted by Martin Hall.

programme.title: The Skill Code: The Playbook: Power Play
programme.desc: 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, Cameron McCormick kicks off his newest series with the underlying principle of distance: clubhead speed. Learn the keys to clubhead speed and how it leads to more distance with the driver.

programme.title: The Skill Code: The Playbook: Takeoff
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick takes a deep dive on club delivery to maximize your speed and distance. Learn how to achieve dynamic loft and proper angle of attack from Trinity Forest Golf Club in Dallas, Texas.

programme.title: The Skill Code: The Playbook: Use the Force
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick brings you inside his lab to scientifically prove how ground forces affect the golf swing. McCormick explains how to achieve maximum power with the lead leg and how to move properly through the swing with the trail leg.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como: Matthew Wolff and George Gankas
programme.desc: Chris Como visits 20-year-old PGA Tour winner Matthew Wolff and long-time coach George Gankas in southern California. Gankas shares why Wolff's unorthodox backswing is effective and teaches how to create speed by focusing on rotation.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como: Xander and Stefan Schauffele
programme.desc: Learn how Xander Schauffele built his swing with his father and swing coach Stefan, and how track and field was incorporated in the process.

programme.title: Como Concepts: More Speed
programme.desc: Chris Como reveals how the pros are hitting the ball farther than ever before. Tiger Woods’ former swing consultant shares an innovative drill on how an axe can help you add distance. Plus, experts like Dr. Sasho MacKenzie and Kevin Duffy give advice.

programme.title: Como Concepts: Maximizing Impact
programme.desc: Chris Como teaches how to add distance without changing clubhead speed. Chris reveals how increasing the angle of attack leads to crushing the driver, and the keys to the stinger shot made famous by former student Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 1: Back to Basics
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal take you back to basics to achieve an ideal impact position with your feet, hands, hips and shoulders. Martin will reveal how a Samurai sword came in handy for Jack Nicklaus throughout his career and how it can help you.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 6: Arnold Palmer
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O’Neal will honour Arnold Palmer and his lasting legacy on golf instruction. Learn the two anchors to Palmer’s powerful swing and drills to add a little Arnie to your own game. Plus, look back at Arnold's appearance in 2012.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: Pinehurst
programme.desc: Matt Ginella explores the past, present, and future of Pinehurst as he plays the famous No. 2 course, tours Dornoch Cottage and Pinehurst Brewery and takes a flying lesson.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: Whistler
programme.desc: Matt Ginella tees it up with Olympic gold medalists and Whistler residents, Marielle Thompson and Seth Wescott and enjoys some axe throwing, mountain bike trails and the record-breaking Peak 2 Peak Whistler Gondola.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: Sea Island
programme.desc: Matt Ginella gets an up close and personal look at the redesigned Plantation Course with Hall of Famer Davis Love III, gets into a heated competition with PGA Tour winner Keith Mitchell and goes fishing for speckled seatrout.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: Scottsdale
programme.desc: NFL superstar Larry Fitzgerald and NHL legend Jeremy Roenick show Matt the best in Scottsdale. Mountain biking, driving school and a round with Geoff Ogilvy are all on tap in the desert.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: The Bahamas
programme.desc: Matt Ginella experiences all that The Bahamas and Atlantis has to offer including paddle boarding with dolphins, swimming with sharks and golfing at The Ocean Club.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: Baha Mar
programme.desc: Sharks, jet surfing, and flamingos are on the schedule as Matt Ginella experiences the hospitality of the Bahamas. He'll explore a course-side bat cave, tee it up at the Jack Nicklaus designed Royal Blue Golf Club and check out waters at the Baha Mar.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: The Palm Beaches
programme.desc: Miss America 2015, Kira K Dixon, plays golf on some local gems including the famous PGA National course. Other adventures include learning about local wildlife, wake-boarding, and Polo.

programme.title: Golf Advisor Round Trip: Pinehurst
programme.desc: Matt Ginella explores the past, present, and future of Pinehurst as he plays the famous No. 2 course, tours Dornoch Cottage and Pinehurst Brewery and takes a flying lesson.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Life Beyond Death
programme.desc: We explore the mystery of what happens to us after we die. Clues may lie in unusual cases of near-death experiences, reincarnation, and how memories can be passed between organ donors and recipients.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Incredible Survivors
programme.desc: How do some people live through the impossible? Whether it's plane crashes, bearing freezing temperatures, or performing superhuman feats while in danger- remarkable tales of human survival force us to reconsider what we know about our own will to live.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Evil Places
programme.desc: Deadly forests, haunted houses, and mountains where visitors never make it back alive.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Mind
programme.desc: We explore the mysteries of the inscrutable mind.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Drilling Down: Putting the Pieces Together
programme.desc: The lead cross and the red gemstones are only the latest artifacts discovered in the 223-year-old treasure hunt.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Drilling Down: The Truth Behind the Curse
programme.desc: If there's a curse on Oak Island, where does it come from? Some believe that there's a power at play that's fighting against the discovery of the Oak Island treasure.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Drilling Down: The Secret Weapons
programme.desc: The team sheds light on their 'secret weapon' helpers who've assisted with some excellent discoveries, including: Gary Drayton, Charles Barkhouse, Doug Crowell, Paul Troutman, Dan Henskee, and Tony Sampson.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: The Templar Connection
programme.desc: The discovery of the mysterious lead cross raised new questions about a Knights Templar connection. Tonight, we take a look at Templar history and the compelling Templar clues the team has found so far.
