programme.desc: A pilot breaks the time barrier and finds himself on a post-WWIII Earth.

programme.title: Movie: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: In the 23rd century, a ship and its crew arrive on a faraway planet. Twenty years earlier, an Earth ship disappeared while en route to the planet. In that time, Morbius created an Eden-like world for himself and his nubile daughter.

programme.title: Movie: World Without End
programme.desc: Astronauts are trapped in a time warp that sends them into a mutant-inhabited Earth.

programme.title: Movie: The Time Machine
programme.desc: George is an inventor in Victorian England who throws a dinner party on New Year's Eve 1899 to announce that he's created a vehicle for traveling through time. After his guests leave, he enters his machine and travels to the future.

programme.title: Movie: Logan's Run
programme.desc: Set in the 23rd century, Logan's Run takes place in a world of peace and immediate pleasure, where nobody grows old. After the age of 30, people go in for renewal, meaning they are killed. But in this paradise, there are some who strive to live past 30.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: The Tutor
programme.desc: Owen volunteers to tutor the school's star basketball player, Big Jim, so that he can pass an upcoming test and be eligible to play in the game.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Gwen is surprised when her older brother Jasper unexpectedly shows up to Camp Kikiwaka and encourages her to leave with him.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Serfs Up-rising
programme.desc: It's Renaissance week, so Lou assigns roles for each camper to play. Finn is declared the king and gets to run the camp for a week, but he ultimately makes the camp miserable.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: You've Got Female
programme.desc: Sydney organizes a school protest about being more inclusive of women. Young Max befriends a skater girl, but is conflicted because the Dog Boys don't allow girls in their crew.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Nightmare On Syd Street
programme.desc: Something embarrassing happens to Sydney while at school, so she holes up in her bedroom. She finds old VHS tapes of Max as a kid, falls asleep and dreams she's in the 90's.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Dancin' The Vida Loca
programme.desc: When Sydney struggles with ballet, something her mom was great at, she starts to feel like she's losing touch of her mom.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Dia De La Dina
programme.desc: 'Dia de la Dina' is coming and Gabby is determined to get her mom a gift that makes up for last year's disaster. Meanwhile, Swift prepares for the end of his assignment on Earth.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Darkness
programme.desc: When Gabby discovers Swift is still on earth, she's determined to get him back as principal because his replacement is a nightmare.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Party King and Timbuk, Too
programme.desc: When Gabby decides to throw a party for Jeremy at the Duran house, things quickly get out of hand with some unexpected guests.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Girls Just Want to Have Phones
programme.desc: Nia and Tess challenge Raven and Chelsea to see who can go without technology the longest. Meanwhile, Booker tries to impress a new girl in the building.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights
programme.desc: Booker joins ballet club to win over Danni, but when Logan, the coolest kid in school, makes fun of it, Booker quits.

programme.title: Raven's Home: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: Booker gets jealous when Danni strikes up a friendship with Nia and Tess. Meanwhile, Levi helps Raven and Chelsea realize they should combine their businesses.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Austin & Jessie & Ally: All Star New Year
programme.desc: Austin, Ally, Trish and Dez travel to Times Square where Austin is booked to perform on New Year's Eve. When they can't get through New York City's crowded streets, Jessie comes up with a plan to get them on stage and have Austin record one of her songs.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie Goes to Hollywood
programme.desc: When Christina Ross returns home, Jessie heads to L.A. for a role in a movie. When the kids realize that they still need her, however, they follow Jessie to Hollywood.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: New Year's Eve-A-Rooney
programme.desc: For New Year's Eve, Liv co-hosts and performs at a party, while Maddie questions her long-distance relationship with Diggie after a secret is revealed on live TV.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Steal-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When Maddie tries to set Liv up with a new friend, Liv gets offended and explains she can find her own friends. Unfortunately, this drives Liv towards bad girl Kylie Kramer.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Gwen is surprised when her older brother Jasper unexpectedly shows up to Camp Kikiwaka and encourages her to leave with him.

programme.title: Bunk'd: The Ones That Got Away
programme.desc: Emma and Xander are teamed up for the fishing competition and realize they have nothing in common. Zuri and Tiffany decide to steal their fish from the mess hall.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Camp Rules
programme.desc: Emma and Zuri won't stop fighting, so Lou sends them out in a canoe in the middle of the lake to work out their differences.

programme.title: Jessie: G.I. Jessie
programme.desc: Jessie returns to Texas with the Ross kids in tow, excited to show them the military base where she was raised and introduce them to her father, only to learn the surprising news that her dad is engaged to be married to her high school rival's mother.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy

programme.title: Doctor Who: Blink
programme.desc: A young woman finds cryptic messages from 1969 coming from a stranger called the Doctor when people start disappearing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Silence in the Library

programme.title: Doctor Who: Forest of the Dead
programme.desc: As the shadows rise, the Doctor forges an alliance with the mysterious River Song. While the Doctor discovers secrets and revelations about his own future, the sinister Nodes declare that Donna is doomed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Amy's Choice
programme.desc: After being going for five years, the Doctor reappears in Amy's life and she is faced with having to make a terrible choice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vincent and the Doctor
programme.desc: Amy finds herself battling a deadly alien in France with none other than Vincent Van Gogh.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor
programme.desc: In 2013, something terrible is awakening in London's National Gallery. In 1562, a murderous plot is afoot in Elizabethan England. Meanwhile, somewhere in space an ancient battle reaches its devastating conclusion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor
programme.desc: The Doctor must sacrifice everything to save a town called Christmas from the Time Lord's greatest enemies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The End of Time
programme.desc: It's the Tenth Doctor's final journey and his psychotic nemesis the Master has been reborn, on Christmas Eve. The Doctor faces the end of his life as the Master's plans hurtle out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Snowmen
programme.desc: An old friend and an unorthodox young governess must bring the Doctor out of mourning so he can face the chilling menace threatening humankind on Christmas Eve 1892.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor
programme.desc: In 2013, something terrible is awakening in London's National Gallery. In 1562, a murderous plot is afoot in Elizabethan England. Meanwhile, somewhere in space an ancient battle reaches its devastating conclusion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Beast Below
programme.desc: The Doctor and Amy travel to Britain of the far-off future, where people live in a giant spaceship. The Doctor encounters someone who knew one of his previous incarnations, and Amy comes across the terrifying Smilers and an awful secret.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Woman Who Fell to Earth
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who is unable to remember her own name falls from the night sky, and forever changes the lives of Ryan Sinclair, Yasmin Khan, and Graham O'Brien.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ghost Monument
programme.desc: The Doctor and her new friends are still reeling from their first encounter, while trying to stay alive long enough in a hostile alien environment.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Rosa

programme.title: Doctor Who: Arachnids in the UK
programme.desc: Once the Doctor and her crew find their way back to Yorkshire, they find something stirring amongst the eight-legged arachnid population of Sheffield.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Tsuranga Conundrum
programme.desc: The Doctor and her crew must band together with a group of strangers to battle one of the universe's most deadly and strange creatures, in the wilds of a far-flung galaxy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Demons of the Punjab
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers demons haunting the land of Punjab, India in 1947, while the country is being torn apart.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Kerblam!

programme.desc: The Doctor, Ryan, Graham and Yaz arrive in 17th century Lancashire and become embroiled in a witch trial, run by the local landowner.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: End of Innocence
programme.desc: The 2000s begin with the threat of anthrax letters in America and the crash of the Concorde in France. Take a look at what led to the decision to invade Iraq and its aftermath. Plus, a look at the rise of video special effects in movies and video games.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Things Get Real
programme.desc: Topics include: the launch of the iPhone; the birth of social media; Michael Jackson's death; US troops deployed to Iraq; the housing bubble swells and then bursts; Lehman brothers fails and the global financial crash is triggered; man-mad climate change.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Chaos and Crisis
programme.desc: Topics include: the tragedy of the Kursk; the rise of reality shows like 'Survivor;' the 'summer of the shark;' the attack on the U.S.S. Cole by Al Qaeda; the tragedy of 9/11 and how America came to terms with it and learned to laugh again.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: Topics include: the tsunami of 2004; the triumphant capture of Saddam Hussein; Janet Jackson's 'wardrobe malfunction' at the Super Bowl halftime show; the creation of YouTube; 'Queer Eye for the Straight Guy;' Hurricane Katrina and the government failure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: China's Forbidden Wonders
programme.desc: New evidence is revealing the dark secrets of relics unearthed from archaeology sites in China, and using the latest science and cutting-edge tech, experts might finally answer some of the greatest mysteries of long-lost Chinese civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Templars
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the shocking truth behind the Knights Templar, the religious order of medieval warriors shrouded in secrecy, scandal, and treasure; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts might finally bring their darkest secrets to light.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Templars
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the shocking truth behind the Knights Templar, the religious order of medieval warriors shrouded in secrecy, scandal, and treasure; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts might finally bring their darkest secrets to light.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Police investigate a photographer when a model goes missing after a photo shoot.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime of Passion: The Pamela Smart Story
programme.desc: Pamela Smart seduced her 15-year-old lover into killing her husband.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Like any dad, Titus wants the best for his son. As an EMT, he sees just how dire life can get. Meanwhile, police officers continue to work desperately to get guns off the street and make the city a safer place to live.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: The first responders deal with a rash of scary calls, including a man suffering from amnesia after getting hit by a car and a woman who fell off a roof.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Let's Play Pirate
programme.desc: When Nikki Orvin fell in love and married Damon Bamberg she had no idea what a twisted family she was now a part of. Soon after giving birth to Damon's son, Nikki realized that she was not the only woman in her husband's life.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Breakfast for a Dead Man
programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Rum Chaser/ Murder for Nothing
programme.desc: Darlene George and her 13-year-old son are the victims of a random home invasion robbery. But when police arrive, Darlene's husband, Winston George is found in the basement, hog-tied and strangled.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: Rhonda's Gone
programme.desc: On December 2nd 2014, Rhonda Daugherty vanishes. Detectives turn to the public for information on her mysterious disappearance. A tip leads investigators to surveillance footage from a hotel where they uncover a journey of duplicity and deception.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Decoding a Murder
programme.desc: It was a case that haunted Lancaster, Pennsylvania: the 1992 murder of teacher Christy Mirack. More than two decades later, a new breed of detective would help break the case, using DNA in a whole new way. And unmasking a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What If
programme.desc: 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, newly pregnant, has vanished while visiting her on-again-off-again boyfriend. Her mother's desperate search leads to a disturbing connection with another mother miles away.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A pretty social media sensation and an NBA superstar connect online. But as the relationship heats up, extortion and threats of violence turn their romance into a nightmare.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gypsy Blanchard
programme.desc: A mother is found dead and her disabled daughter missing. As police investigate, they discover many secrets, lies, and betrayals.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Slenderman
programme.desc: New details emerged in the trial of the two girls who stabbed their best friend 19 times and left her for dead in the Wisconsin woods.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Rehab Mogul
programme.desc: He was the owner of more than 20 drug treatment facilities in two states. But some former clients claim the man dubbed 'Rehab Mogul,' Chris Bathum, was a drug user and sexual predator. They say he didn't help their recovery, he derailed it.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Manhunt
programme.desc: This real life prison break captivated the nation last month and kept a small upstate New York town on edge for three weeks until convicted murderers Richard Matt was shot and killed and David Sweat was shot and captured.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Camera Didn't See
programme.desc: It was a murder mystery that lingered for years. Nique Leili, a wife and mother, was found dead near her suburban home a week after going missing. Her family immediately suspected husband Matt, who filed for divorce within days of her disappearance.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: She spent 11 years in prison. But did Noura Jackson really murder her mother? The one-time party girl speaks out about the evidence that put her behind bars, the court decision that set her free, and suspicions that turned her own family against her.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates the double life of Mike Bullinger. Callahan Walsh investigates the case of Tomas Magallon Gonzalez.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Stolen Life
programme.desc: John Walsh explores the case of youthful con man Edgardo Perez, who allegedly preyed on older men until it turned deadly. Then, Callahan Walsh travels to Boulder to talk to a child predator.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Appalachia
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates how Eric Jones, the son of a preacher, allegedly turned to murder. Later, Callahan Walsh tries to make sense of how a dispute over a dog could provoke Ricardo Villanueva Cordova to reportedly commit murder in broad daylight.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Savage Soldier
programme.desc: John Walsh profiles John Blauvelt, a troubled U.S. Army vet who is accused of waging a lethal war against his young wife. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Rudy Fernandez, whose teen romance with his high school sweetheart is believed to have turned deadly.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: When Good Meets Evil
programme.desc: John profiles Juan Lazaro Abrego, a man believed to have killed his ex-girlfriend, while Callahan investigates Derek Dean, a man accused of shooting a pair of identical twins, killing one and wounding the other.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Bombing: As We Watched
programme.desc: America is shaken as the Oklahoma Federal Building is bombed. When Timothy McVeigh is convicted, questions surface as to why he carried out this act of terrorism.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Bombing: As We Watched
programme.desc: America is shaken as the Oklahoma Federal Building is bombed. When Timothy McVeigh is convicted, questions surface as to why he carried out this act of terrorism.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.desc: The Snow Sisters win a large home at an auction in The Colony, Texas, and have to move it in two pieces.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Upscale Salvage
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win a three-bedroom, one-bathroom home with a nonsensical layout. They improve the flow of the house by building a large master suite addition. The home's modern update is completed with a revamped kitchen and dining room.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Fancy Farmhouse
programme.desc: Gary's Girls transform a former duplex acquired at auction into a high-end single-family home. They build an addition to increase square footage and create a new bedroom and bathroom designed with sophisticated style elements.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Industrial Home
programme.desc: Casey wins a tiny home at auction but is disappointed with the condition of the interior. Catrina and Zack help him upgrade the house by building an addition to increase the square footage and installing high-end industrial finishes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Miami Flip: Pinching Pennies
programme.desc: A determined Carolina saves money while making over three bedrooms and a master bath. She reuses materials in need of a good cleaning and refurbishes abandoned furniture to use for staging.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Off the Ranch in Colorado
programme.desc: After choosing possible houses in the Denver region, newlyweds Jennifer and Matt tour the structures with Mike, who shows them how to tell whether a home is a good buy or if it's a house that deserves a "goodbye".

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Trio Hunts for Home in Aurora
programme.desc: In Aurora, Colorado, Mike lends a hand to newlyweds Ambera and Clayton.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: New Home for Single Mom
programme.desc: Mike travels to Denver to help single mom Terrie find the right house for her and her daughters. Mike shows her how to identify any problems or imperfections that could turn the house from a dream home into a nightmare of repairs.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Make Cake and Influence People
programme.desc: Chief cake artist Dave and his ambitious assistant Tom go into battle to come up with two new cakes for tough boss Christine. They then have to create a cake which will be auctioned at a glamorous charity event hosted by TV personality Davina McCall.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Cake and Cupids Conquer All
programme.desc: The team have two very different challenges. The first is a wedding cake that's dripping in designer shoes and the other is an unusual request for a cake designed around the tragic tale of Miss Havisham.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: I Put a Spell on You
programme.desc: It's Halloween and the time of year when the team of chocolatier geniuses at Choccywoccydoodah come into their own. They unleash their eccentricity and create wondrous and terrifying chocolate masterpieces.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Special Delivery
programme.desc: The team has two special cake deliveries. The first is a cake for Victoria Smurfitt's mum to celebrate her birthday. And the second is to celebrate the 25th anniversary of the best selling hard rock song ever.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Queen of Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Carnivals, Cityscapes and Glowing Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes
programme.desc: A rancher's birthday party calls for a pair of larger-than-life cowboy boots. Next, the Texas Reptile Zoo celebrates with a realistic snake cake that blows everyone's mind. Finally, two special cakes are filled with hidden surprises.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Gravity-Defying Musical Cakes
programme.desc: A 50s-themed cake with a working jukebox is music to everyone's ears and an out-of-this-world wedding cake gets filled with hand-sculpted edible zombies! Next, an alligator groom's cake looks like it crawled right out of the swamp.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Out of This World Upside Down Cakes
programme.desc: An upside-down wedding cake hanging from a chandelier is covered in sparkly rhinestones for the big day, plus an edible truck jumps over a Vegas ghost town. The planet Earth is made of cake, and one baker creates a realistic, 3D motorcycle cake.

programme.desc: The gang visits the set of Scooby's favourite TV show, where he meets the star, and his celebrity crush. Now, all Scooby has to do is work up the courage to talk to her while also solving the mystery of a monstrous Gargoyle attacking the production.

programme.title: Bunnicula: Dating for Dummies
programme.desc: After Mina's dad goes on a date with a talented ventriloquist, Bunnicula realizes that he's the one who’s been played for a dummy.

programme.title: Bunnicula: Chester's Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Chester takes a shine to a sinister Venus flytrap because the plant scares Bunnicula, but the plant has plans of its own.

programme.title: Bunnicula: Ghost Pepper
programme.desc: After Bunnicula consumes a spicy ghost pepper, he starts burning up everything in sight. Now it's up to Harold and Chester to cool things off.

programme.title: Bunnicula: Evil Cat Videos
programme.desc: Chester isn’t acting like himself lately, but the trouble doesn’t really start until Bunnicula realizes that Chester has been watching a possessed video cassette.

programme.title: Looney Tunes

programme.desc: Count Craigor comes to the King's castle to be a tutor but harbours a secret need.

programme.title: The Smurfs: The Ring of Castellac
programme.desc: A drugged duke needs to be returned to his place by Johan, Peewit, and the Smurfs.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends: Nighty Nightmare/ Banana Nose/ Ode to Odie
programme.desc: After Garfield devours Jon’s entire pizza, Garfield has a nightmare where he grows into a gigantic cat, climbing tall buildings; the usually “hard” Roy has his feelings hurt when he is called “Banana Nose,” so he decides to leave the farm.

programme.title: Garfield and Friends: Fraidy Cat/ Shell-Shocked Sheldon/ Nothing to Sneeze At
programme.desc: When Jon is at the store, the lights go out as Garfield and Odie are watching a horror film; tired of Sheldon being an egg, Orson decides to hatch him, only to have Sheldon stolen by a hungry fox.

programme.title: Tom and Jerry Tales: Fire Breathing Tomcat/ Medieval Menace/ The Itch
programme.desc: Cat-and-mouse chase continues in new geographic locales and culturally diverse settings.

programme.title: Ben 10

programme.title: Wabbit
programme.desc: The hilarious and mischievous Bugs Bunny you love is back. He battles wits against, and getting the best of, classic characters like Yosemite Sam and Wile E. Coyote. He'll also encounter new foes and have help from new friends like Bigfoot.

programme.title: Wabbit
programme.desc: The hilarious and mischievous Bugs Bunny you love is back. He battles wits against, and getting the best of, classic characters like Yosemite Sam and Wile E. Coyote. He'll also encounter new foes and have help from new friends like Bigfoot.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Features the antics of Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Elmer Fudd, Porky Pig, Sylvester, and more.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Mystery on the Muppet Express / Mister Manny
programme.desc: When Buddy the Bunny goes missing on the Muppet Babies Express, Summer Penguin sets out to find him. Mr. Manny steps in for Miss Nanny when she runs an errand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Vamp-Opera/ This Haunted House is Closed
programme.desc: Vee writes a song made of a spell that gets the whole town singing! Before the Hauntley's can restore the B&B to it's spooky state, an inspector pops up to check it's spookiness.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Prix/ Pirates Ahoy!
programme.desc: Catboy is tempted to cheat when he must race to win back his stolen Catcar. When Gekko and Owlette's overconfidence plays right into Ninja's plan, they must learn to work together.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and Gekko's Robot Rampage/ Owlette's Feathered Friend
programme.desc: When Romeo’s new robot, Robette, gets a screw lose she decides to take over the world by herself. Owlette finds a bird in HQ and decides that she’ll be the perfect pet owner.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Best, Best Friend / Counting Kermits
programme.desc: When he fears he's losing his BFF, Fozzie tries to prove he's Kermit's BEST best friend. Bunsen and Beaker invent a Make-Another-You-Inator to help Kermit play four games at once.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Finders Keepers/ Monster Next Door
programme.desc: Rizzo discovers emeralds in the sandbox and has to decide whether to keep them or not; the Muppet Babies must rescue Potato after he accidentally ends up with a monster.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette and the Owlteenies / Gekko's Blame Campaign
programme.desc: When Night Ninja pushes the Ninjalinos too far, they become Owlette’s new sidekicks. When Greg doesn’t take care of Cameron's mini-car, it goes missing.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy Takes Control / Owlette's Two Wrongs
programme.desc: Romeo builds a remote that can control the PJ Masks. When Night Ninja breaks Owlette’s Flossy Flash art statue, Owlette tries to get back at him by destroying his masterpiece.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals discover what has been keeping Prince Pete awake, after trying hard to help him fall asleep for a nap. It was a stack of peas under the cushion of his favourite car.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sea Captain Mickey
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: No Laughing Matter/ Puppy for a Day
programme.desc: Fozzie loses his Great Uncle Schnozzie's Jokebook and is convinced he can't be funny without it. The Muppets try to convince Miss Nanny that they're ready for a puppy.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Starship Piggy/ My Buddy
programme.desc: Piggy takes credit for the spaceship Kermit made and takes the Muppet Babies to outer space. Animal lets Fozzie borrow his stuffed bunny, Buddy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Safari, So Goody
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Secret Spy Daisy
programme.desc: A thief tries to steal Clarabelle's secret raisin cookies recipe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sir Goofs-a-lot
programme.desc: Goofy sets out on a quest to retrieve three items in order to be knighted the bravest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Color Adventure
programme.desc: Mickey's Rainbow Color Machine runs out of color, which starts to cause a problem.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey- Go- Seek
programme.desc: Viewers are asked to find Donald who is especially good at hiding.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Special Delivery
programme.desc: Donald gets upset when all of his friends get mail, but he doesn't get any.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Petting Zoo
programme.desc: Goofy along with Mickey are on the search for the Zoo animals Goofy let escape from work.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy on Mars
programme.desc: Goofy crash-lands on Mars and it's up to the Sensational Six to save him.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Just like the fairy tale, Minnie comes across trouble in the woods.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mousekeball!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake introduces the Clubhouse pals to a high-tech new game, Floatin' Fun-Time Mousekeball! But when the ball with a mind of its own escapes, the game takes to the skies!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Abra-ka-Goof!/ Happy Birthday Helpers!
programme.desc: Goofy thinks he's used his magician skills to turn Gordon Gear into a rabbit. Later, the Happy Helpers go on a wild ride as they chase down a wagon carrying a birthday cake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Agent Double-O-Goof/ Egg-xasperating!
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the Queen of England to come for tea, Goofy is mistaken for a secret agent in charge of delivering a top-secret briefcase. The Happy Helpers are charged with watching Clara Cluck's egg while she runs errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Billy Beagle's Tip-Top Garage/ Diner Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daredevil Goofy!/ The Big Broadcast
programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.title: The Rocketeer: First Flight / Pilot Error
programme.desc: When Kit's parents decide she's too young for flying lessons, her dream to fly comes true in an unexpected way! Tesh tries to upgrade Kit's Rocketeer superhero gear.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moonfizzle Balls/ Soccer Ninjalinos
programme.desc: Catboy works a bit too fast to kick back Luna Girl’s moonfizzle balls. Owlette learns that being part of the team means coaching Catboy and Gekko to defeat Night Ninja.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wheels of a Hero / Moonwolfy
programme.desc: Armadylan steals the PJ Masks' vehicles. Kevin turns full wolfy on a trip to the moon.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: SEC Nation

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: MLB Epic Moments: Captain's Quest
programme.desc: Yankee legend Derek Jeter strives to deliver his 3,000 hit milestone in front of his hometown fans and does so with style.

programme.title: MLB Epic Moments: Nearly Perfect
programme.desc: Clayton Kershaw is the premier pitcher of this generation. On June 18th 2014, he solidified his place in baseball history with a no-hitter that ranks among the best of all-time.

programme.title: MLB Epic Moments: Mad October
programme.desc: Madison Bumgarner's post-season run in 2014 is considered by many as the most dominant pitching performance in post-season history. Bumgarner pitched a record-breaking number of innings and racked up MVPs in both the NLCS and World Series.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Movie: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between two worlds, Hellboy, a half-man, half-demon must defeat an ancient sorceress.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Country music superstar Jackson Maine thinks that he's found the solution to his drinking problem when he finds happiness with an up-and-coming young singer-songwriter, but when her career begins to eclipse his he falls back into his old habits.

programme.title: Movie: Us
programme.desc: Evil doppelgangers terrorize a vacationing family.

programme.title: Animals.: Episode One: Rats
programme.desc: Examine the downtrodden creatures native to Earth's least-habitable environment; New York City.

programme.title: Movie: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Ray, a working father of two, struggles to save his family when aliens invade Earth with the aim of destroying it. Ray comes to the defence of his children as the world deals with a force it has never known.

programme.title: Movie: Kin
programme.desc: On the same day that his older brother is released from prison, a boy finds a deadly alien weapon in a junkyard. With a revenge-seeking crime lord, inquisitive government agents and dangerous alien soldiers all after them, the brothers go on the run.

programme.title: Movie: Red Eye
programme.desc: A flight home turns into a nightmare for Lisa Reisert when she is taken hostage by a fellow passenger, who is involved in an assassination plot against the head of Homeland Security. Lisa tries to stop the plot and keep her family from being harmed too.

programme.title: Movie: Getaway
programme.desc: When his wife gets kidnapped, an ex-racecar driver steals a car and drags the car's owner into a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Movie: The Old Man & the Gun
programme.desc: A charming 70-year-old man with an easy smile and quiet demeanor meets a lovely woman while he's fleeing the police. The two begin a romance, despite him being a serial bank robber and a prison escapee who's captured the public's imagination.

programme.title: Movie: Unknown
programme.desc: After awakening from a coma, a man discovers that his identity has been stolen.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A family man and snowplow driver is named his small town's citizen of the year for his lifetime of service to the snowy community, but his euphoria is shattered when his son turns up dead, transforming the father into a killer out for revenge.

programme.title: Game of Thrones: The Last of the Starks
programme.desc: In the wake of a costly victory, Jon and Daenerys look to the south as Tyrion eyes a compromise that could save countless lives.

programme.title: Game of Thrones: The Bells
programme.desc: Daenerys and Cersei weigh their options as an epic conflict looms at King’s Landing.

programme.title: Game of Thrones: The Iron Throne
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Daenerys' attack on the capital, Westeros finds a new leader.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Fingerbutt

programme.desc: Molly needs to adjust her spending habits on shoes if she wants to maintain harmony in her marriage.

programme.title: Mom: Chicken Nuggets and a Triple Homicide
programme.desc: In order to get the family back together, Christy and Bonnie rent a house with a colourful past. Meanwhile, Bonnie tries to broker peace between Christy and Alvin.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hookers, Hookers, Hookers
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Eldridge move into Charlie's house after Alan burns down their home.

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up
programme.desc: When Zoey gets into several colleges around the country, Dre and Bow begin to feel worried and sentimental. They reflect back on memories they've had with the family and wonder what life will be like without her around all the time.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Nanny
programme.desc: Dre and Bow start to slip on the kids' activities and chores around the house, so Bow persuades Dre to hire a nanny. After several interviews that don't go well, they meet Vivian, who impresses them with her desire to take care of the whole family.

programme.title: iHeartRadio Music Festival: Night Two
programme.desc: Night two of the iHeart Music Festival at Las Vegas' T-Mobile Arena, with acts by Alicia Keys, Miley Cyrus, Chance the Rapper, Zac Brown Band, Mumford and Suns, and more. Hosted by Ryan Seacrest.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Dirty Day
programme.desc: Joey gets a film role but is in hot water when he is caught showering in a dressing room.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Truth
programme.desc: When George dumps his new girlfriend, he mistakenly tells her the reason for their split.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Joyce's Will Be Done
programme.desc: Molly is shocked when Joyce reveals she's leaving the house to Victoria in her will.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Immortal Mr. Billy Joel
programme.desc: Alan goes out on the town, pretending to be Charlie, while Charlie sneaks off for some cosmetic surgery.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Rush
programme.desc: When Beverly gives Adam a "Best Son" trophy, Barry brings to her attention that she always favours Adam. Appalled, Beverly decides to ignore Adam (much to his delight) and smother Barry (much to his dislike), but it backfires.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Baré
programme.desc: When Erica is getting the bulk of her college acceptance letters, Barry is determined to become a doctor and starts to check out schools with the best medical programs.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Brand Job
programme.desc: Max and Caroline's partnership and friendship is almost torn apart when Caroline drags Max to a seminar to help brand their cupcake business.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Grand Opening, Grand Closing
programme.desc: Jason's ego takes a hit when Chardonnay rejects his proposal about hooking up after their upcoming annulment. Meanwhile, Derwin is shocked to find out Melanie is living the V.I.P. life at church.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mutton Busting
programme.desc: With some guidance from Mike, Ryan convinces an overprotective Kristin to let Boyd participate in the mutton-busting competition at the rodeo to help build Boyd's confidence.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Newton vs. Newton
programme.desc: A slippery husband with a cheating past has triggered a woman’s intuition into suspecting he’s back to his old ways.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Sabotaged Weekend; Infinite War
programme.desc: Woman claims she was stranded before an important weekend trip. Man says his boss failed to pay him after he worked a comic book convention.

programme.desc: Inappropriate behavior leads a man to cancel his contract; a friend sues over lost silver serving dishes.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Hoover vs. Armour
programme.desc: A man is determined to prove to his fiancée that he is the biological father of her daughter and not her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Youth Protest
programme.desc: A man sues when a protest disrupts his business.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her sister for the balance due on a loan and claims she harassed her and threatened her life.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Stay Way From Us', 'Pooling Around' and 'A Doggone Dog Napper.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Scalp on Fire/ You Can't Do That
programme.desc: Father sues for medical expenses; man sues for compensation for using his photo.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Young entrepreneurs are in court over a breach of contract where the defendant failed to pay a personal loan used to boost the plaintiff's musical career. Then, parties dispute whether $4600 was a loan or a gift from a friend with benefits.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mom Guilty of Child Porn with Daughters
programme.desc: Bertie claims her mother, Minnie, recorded her and her sisters performing sexual acts on each other and also invited men over to molest them. Minnie claims these allegations are untrue.

programme.title: Maury: Your 17-Year-Old Girlfriend Needs to Butt Out ... This Is Your Baby!
programme.desc: Reshonda cheated on her fiancé Darrel once, and now he's denying their daughter. Alyssa wants to prove to Tyler and his girlfriend that Tyler's her baby's father. Cierra's back to prove her to her ex Michael and brother that Michael's her baby's father.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: Inspired by their friend's sudden death, three life-long friends go on a journey to fulfill their long-time dream of finding a lost fortune in the Oregon Mountains.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a father is searching all over town for a toy for his son. While his son is at home wondering where he is, the neighbour is hitting on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Get Over It
programme.desc: After being dumped by his girlfriend, a high school basketball star fights to win her back through any means possible. With the help of his friend's sister, he joins the school musical in an effort to get closer to her.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: After getting off on the wrong foot with his future in-laws, Greg now faces a greater challenge: introducing his straight-laced in-laws to his own free-spirited family.

programme.title: Movie: Little Fockers
programme.desc: A tightly wound father-in-law still has doubts about his son-in-law, even after 10 years of marriage to his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Easy Money
programme.desc: A hard-living gambling addict must change his lifestyle in order to inherit a fortune.

programme.title: Movie: In Her Shoes
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters, with opposite dispositions, find out what bonds them together after meeting the grandmother they never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: Going the Distance
programme.desc: A couple tries to keep their relationship going as they travel between New York and San Francisco to see each other.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.
